name: The Unnamed Majority
specialty: Specialists in navigating and exploiting rifts, offering unrivaled access to rare resources

members.name: Kael Thornwhisper
members.note: A scar running across his left eye, remnant of a close encounter with a rift beast

members.name: Grimm Stonefist
members.note: Missing right arm replaced with a gleaming obsidian prosthetic

members.name: Eira Moonshadow
members.note: Renowned for her unmatched senses, she never misses a trail

members.name: Zephyr Swiftfoot
members.note: Known for his silver tongue and quick wit, he smooths over any obstacle

visual: Clad in leather armor and cloaks, they move with a practiced ease through the Undercity's chaotic streets, a group of seasoned professionals with an air of mystery around them.
reputation_note: Whispers of an unnamed crew who can deliver what no one else can find, but at a steep price
